title: Exemptions for confidential business information for workplace hazardous products: Searchable list - Canada.ca
content:
## Exemptions for confidential business information for workplace hazardous products: Searchable list
- Claim registration and validity
- Compliance review and enforcement
The list of claims for exemption under the Hazardous Materials Information Review Act is a searchable webpage that summarizes claims filed for exemption from disclosure of confidential business information submitted to Health Canada.
All key information available for an exemption is identified on the list, including:
List of claims for exemption under the Hazardous Materials Information Review Act
Consult the terminology webpage for explanations of the fields used in the list. These are not legal definitions.
List of claims for exemption: Terminology
